protocol: benchmarks/fixtures/PREREGISTRATION_semantic_v1.md (fixture, metrics, stats, decision corpus size) + the ablation_arms.py module docstring (config enumeration + adjacent comparisons, declared before any run)
contamination: ZERO-SHOT / NO CONTAMINATION: reranker Xenova/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2 is MS-MARCO-trained and embedder BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 is web-corpus-trained; semantic_v1 is synthetic, AI-authored (2026) — zero-shot for both models. No MS-MARCO-derived data is evaluated.

config_card.contamination: ZERO-SHOT / NO CONTAMINATION: reranker Xenova/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2 is MS-MARCO-trained and embedder BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 is web-corpus-trained; semantic_v1 is synthetic, AI-authored (2026) — zero-shot for both models. No MS-MARCO-derived data is evaluated.
config_card.latency: no latency numbers are claimed in the ablation lane

config_enumeration.justification: 2x2x2 grid = 8 raw combos; vector-off AND lexical-off is defined-empty by product contract (ADR-0024) and reranking an empty list is the identity, so its two +-rerank variants collapse into one config (collapse asserted at run time): 8 - 2 + 1 = 7 valid configs, 6 measured + 1 defined-empty.

configs.legs: vector OFF, lexical ON, rerank OFF
vector OFF, lexical ON, rerank ON
vector ON, lexical OFF, rerank OFF
configs.path: adapter.vector_query(k=30) direct [harness-composed; no use_lexical lever exists]

configs.legs: vector ON, lexical OFF, rerank ON
vector ON, lexical ON, rerank OFF
vector ON, lexical ON, rerank ON
vector OFF, lexical OFF (+-rerank collapse asserted)
configs.path: hybrid_search(use_vector=False) with CAP_LEXICAL off [shipped ADR-0024 branch via harness capability shim]
configs.status: defined-empty (all metrics identically 0; not a quality row)

config_card.path: hybrid_search(candidates=N[, reranker=ce]) — shipped kwarg, no product change
config_card.contamination: ZERO-SHOT / NO CONTAMINATION: reranker Xenova/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2 is MS-MARCO-trained and embedder BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 is web-corpus-trained; semantic_v1 is synthetic, AI-authored (2026) — zero-shot for both models. No MS-MARCO-derived data is evaluated.

latency_env.batch: 1 query per call (the product read path shape)
latency_env.note: latency is environment-bound and NOT bit-reproducible; metric numbers are deterministic given the fixed seeds

config_card.latency_stages: embed & rerank measured via injected timing wrappers; retrieve_fuse = end_to_end - embed - rerank (DERIVED); end_to_end wraps the whole hybrid_search call
